{"problem_standardized_math":"Consider the optimization problem of finding the point on the parabola $y=\\frac{1}{5}(x-1)^2$ that is closest to $(1,2)$ in the Euclidean norm. This can be written as\n\\[\n\\min_{x,y}\\; (x-1)^2+(y-2)^2 \\qquad \\text{subject to } (x-1)^2=5y.\n\\]\nFind all KKT points for this problem. Is the LICQ satisfied?"}
